channel.title: The Economic Edge: Master Your Wealth

item.title: The best, and worst, TV series and films of 2026 (so far)
item.description: "Join us as we dive into the highs and lows of 2026's TV and film releases. From blockbuster hits to box office flops, we're discussing the best and worst series and movies of the year so far. Tune in for honest reviews, lively debates, and expert analysis."
